# By Shakir - Luxury Interior Design Studio in Tiel, Netherlands

> By Shakir designs complete luxury residential interiors from concept through installation, working across the Netherlands, Dubai, Barcelona, Antwerpen and Malaga.

## Services
- [Complete Interior Design](https://www.byshakir.com/services/): Full-service luxury interior design covering spatial planning, material selection, bespoke furniture, procurement and installation.
- [3D Design and Visualisation](https://www.byshakir.com/services/3d-design/): Photorealistic 3D renders of every room before construction begins, enabling remote approval and design confidence.

## Portfolio
- [Villa Mansion, Netherlands](https://www.byshakir.com/projects/villa-mansion-netherlands/): Complete luxury interior for a villa mansion in the Netherlands.
- [Duplex Penthouse, Barcelona](https://www.byshakir.com/projects/duplex-penthouse-barcelona/): Mediterranean-inspired luxury interior across two floors in Barcelona.
- [Penthouse, Dubai Marina](https://www.byshakir.com/projects/penthouse-dubai-marina/): Contemporary luxury interior with panoramic marina views in Dubai.
- [Country Estate, Antwerpen](https://www.byshakir.com/projects/country-estate-antwerpen/): Complete interior for a country estate near Antwerpen, Belgium.
- [Beach House, Malaga](https://www.byshakir.com/projects/beach-house-malaga/): Mediterranean coastal interiors with indoor-outdoor living in Malaga.

## Information
- [About](https://www.byshakir.com/about/): Shakir, the principal designer — philosophy, story and showroom in Tiel.
- [FAQ](https://www.byshakir.com/faq/): Common questions about the design process, timeline and international projects.
